# pow

Raises `base` to the power of `exponent`. Useful for exponentiation, square roots, and cube roots.

```rad
pow(_base: float, _exponent: float) -> float
```

```rad
pow(2, 3)      // -> 8
pow(4, 0.5)    // -> 2.0 (square root)
pow(8, 1/3)    // -> 2.0 (cube root)  
pow(2, -2)     // -> 0.25
pow(-2, 3)     // -> -8
```
